description: The practice of working together to create something greater than any could achieve alone. Collaboration encompasses sharing diverse gifts, building on each other's ideas, the joy of collective creation, and generating solutions through synergy rather than compromise.
rationale: The word 'melanu' flows from the personal 'me' through the connective 'la' to the grounded result 'nu'. This three-syllable journey mirrors collaboration's process - individual contributions flowing together to create something new and substantial. Each syllable builds on the previous.
